'''鈭歽-f-sh-m''' ('''kayafshemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calceate|calceate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-sh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calceate|calceate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-f-sh-m
|-
! Lemma
| kayafshemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyafshemoko|thiyafshemoko]] || [[word:jiyafshemoko|jiyafshemoko]] || [[word:shiyafshemoko|shiyafshemoko]] || [[word:kiyafshemoko|kiyafshemoko]]
|-
